subcodes.first_line: O ye who are devoted to the Lord God! When the morn of the Covenant of the All-Merciful dawned forth, and the tidings of the Testament reached both East and West [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فدائیان حضرت یزدان چون صبح میثاق رحمن دمید و آوازه پیمان بشرق و غرب رسید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
